sentences.target: Die Vorstellung beginnt um acht im Kino.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈfoːɐ̯ʃtɛlʊŋ bəˈgɪnt ʊm axt ɪm ˈkiːno/

translations.de: Die Vorstellung beginnt um acht im Kino.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈfoːɐ̯ʃtɛlʊŋ bəˈgɪnt ʊm axt ɪm ˈkiːno/
translations.en: The show starts at eight at the cinema.
translations.es: La película empieza a las ocho en el cine.
translations.fr: La séance commence à huit heures au cinéma.
translations.it: La proiezione inizia alle otto al cinema.
translations.zh-Hans: 电影在电影院八点开始。
translations.ru: Сеанс в кино начинается в восемь.
translations.pt: A sessão começa às oito no cinema.
translations.vi: Suất chiếu bắt đầu lúc tám giờ ở rạp chiếu phim.
translations.ar: العرض يبدأ الساعة الثامنة في السينما.
translations.nl: De voorstelling begint om acht uur in de bioscoop.
translations.uk: Сеанс у кіно починається о восьмій.
translations.hu: Az előadás nyolckor kezdődik a moziban.
translations.hi: फ़िल्म आठ बजे सिनेमाघर में शुरू होती है.
translations.pl: Seans w kinie zaczyna się o ósmej.
translations.el: Η προβολή ξεκινά στις οκτώ στον κινηματογράφο.
translations.nb: Forestillingen starter klokken åtte på kino.
translations.id: Film mulai jam delapan di bioskop.
translations.sv: Föreställningen börjar klockan åtta på bio.
translations.ro: Proiecția începe la ora opt la cinema.
translations.cs: Představení začíná v osm v kině.
translations.da: Forestillingen begynder klokken otte i biografen.
translations.ja: 上映は映画館で8時に始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular, modifies 'Vorstellung' as subject.
Common noun; subject of the clause, refers to a show/performance.
Main finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative.
Preposition marking time; governs accusative in 'um acht'.
Cardinal number; temporal complement as object of 'um'.
Contracted preposition+article ('in dem'); introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative), indicating location.

sentences.target: Ohne Ticket verpasse ich die Vorstellung.

translations.de: Ohne Ticket verpasse ich die Vorstellung.
translations.en: Without a ticket, I’ll miss the show.
translations.es: Sin entrada, me perderé la función.
translations.fr: Sans billet, je vais rater la séance.
translations.zh-Hans: 没有票我就会错过这场电影。
translations.yue: 冇飛我就會錯過呢場戲。
translations.pt: Sem ingresso, vou perder a sessão.
translations.vi: Không có vé, tôi sẽ lỡ suất chiếu.
translations.nl: Zonder kaartje mis ik de voorstelling.
translations.hi: बिना टिकट मैं फ़िल्म नहीं देख पाऊँगा.
translations.el: Χωρίς εισιτήριο θα χάσω την προβολή.
translations.nb: Uten billett går jeg glipp av forestillingen.
translations.id: Tanpa tiket, saya akan melewatkan tayangan.
translations.da: Uden billet går jeg glip af forestillingen.
translations.ja: チケットがないと上映を見逃します。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing accusative; introduces a preposed adverbial PP.
Common noun; object of 'ohne' (accusative).
Main finite verb; 1st person singular present indicative; in V2 position after the initial PP.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative, subject.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular, modifies 'Vorstellung' as direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'verpasse'.

translations.en: Our show was sold out yesterday.
translations.it: Ieri la nostra proiezione era al completo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们昨天的场次已售罄。
translations.yue: 我哋噚日嗰場已經賣晒。
translations.pt: Nossa sessão de ontem estava esgotada.
translations.vi: Suất chiếu hôm qua của chúng tôi đã bán hết vé.
translations.nl: Onze voorstelling van gisteren was uitverkocht.
translations.uk: Наш учорашній сеанс був повністю розпроданий.
translations.hu: A tegnapi előadásunkra minden jegy elkelt.
translations.hi: कल हमारी प्रस्तुति के सभी टिकट बिक गए थे.
translations.el: Τα εισιτήρια για τη χθεσινή μας προβολή εξαντλήθηκαν.
translations.nb: Forestillingen vår i går var utsolgt.
translations.id: Tiket untuk tayangan kami kemarin habis terjual.
translations.sv: Vår föreställning i går var slutsåld.
translations.ro: Biletele la proiecția noastră de ieri s-au epuizat.
translations.da: Vores forestilling i går var udsolgt.
translations.ja: 昨日の上映は完売でした。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with feminine singular nominative, modifies 'Vorstellung'.
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary used as copula; 3rd person singular simple past.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause.
Predicative adjective (participial form) complement of the copula 'war'.

sentences.target: Ich habe keine Vorstellung vom Preis.

translations.de: Ich habe keine Vorstellung vom Preis.
translations.en: I have no idea about the price.
translations.es: No tengo ni idea del precio.
translations.fr: Je n'ai aucune idée du prix.
translations.yue: 我完全唔知價錢係幾多。
translations.ru: Я понятия не имею о цене.
translations.vi: Tôi hoàn toàn không biết giá bao nhiêu.
translations.ar: ليس لدي أي فكرة عن السعر.
translations.nl: Ik heb geen idee van de prijs.
translations.uk: Я не маю жодного уявлення про ціну.
translations.hi: मुझे कीमत के बारे में बिल्कुल पता नहीं है.
translations.el: Δεν έχω ιδέα για την τιμή.
translations.nb: Jeg har ingen anelse om prisen.
translations.sv: Jag har ingen aning om priset.
translations.ro: Nu am nici cea mai mică idee despre preț.
translations.da: Jeg har ingen idé om prisen.
translations.ja: 値段がいくらかまったくわかりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative, subject.
Main verb; 1st person singular present indicative.
Negative determiner; accusative feminine singular, modifies 'Vorstellung'.
Common noun; direct object of 'habe'; here means 'idea/notion'.
Contracted preposition+article ('von dem'); introduces a PP complement specifying the domain ('of the price').
Common noun; object of 'vom' (dative), complementing 'Vorstellung'.

Ohne Ticket verpasse ich die Vorstellung.
Ich habe keine Vorstellung vom Preis.

Without a ticket, I’ll miss the show.
Our show was sold out yesterday.
I have no idea about the price.
